### Entity

>  Entity (id:Optional[str]=None,
>              vocab:Annotated[List[str],MinLen(min_length=1)],
>              content:Dict[str,Any]=<factory>,
>              meta:Optional[Dict[str,Any]]=None,
>              created:datetime.datetime=<factory>)

*Immutable view of a JSON-LD resource with fixes for the identified
issues.*
